Granuloma in the abdominal airsac, attached to the intestinal serose, need to be removed.

Juvenile to adult. Bcs 2,5/5. Testis with small round masses distributed thrue the cranial pole. Few primary and secondary feathers plucked and removed in both wings and tail. Onyx Mottled Caramel dark morph

Juvenile to adult , fat deposit in abdominal cavity, around intestine big lipoma, lower part of the breast, and specially abdomen and around the cloaca and the rump, big lipoma around 7cm. Impossible for proper copulation. Subcutaneous fat in neck and Azure Ghost. Bcs 5/5. Crimson Pastel morph
